title: If I Ain't Got You
why_this_song: If I Ain't Got You by Alicia Keys (2003) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Some people live for the fortune"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Some people want it all"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "If it ain't you, baby"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "If it ain't you, baby"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "But I don't want nothing at all"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Some people live for the fortune
Some people live just for the fame
Some people live for the power, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "people" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "people" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "want" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: If I ain't got you, baby

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Some people live for the fortune

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "If I Ain't Got You" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "If I Ain't Got You" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "If I Ain't Got You" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "If I Ain't Got You"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Alicia Keys one question about "If I Ain't Got You", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Alicia Keys sobre "If I Ain't Got You", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
